title: junellia alba
intro: Junellia alba, also known as the "white junellia," is a type of flowering shrub native to the Andean region of South America. Traditionally, Junellia alba has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Junellia alba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other plants in traditional remedies.
